title: True Nature
description: Realistic MC is a modpack that makes Minecraft feel real. With enhanced graphics, physics, and survival mechanics, it brings a grounded, immersive experience to your world.
body: True Nature is a lightweight visual enhancement modpack that reimagines Minecraft’s world without adding any new blocks. Built entirely with vanilla building mechanics, it focuses on natural terrain generation, realistic lighting, immersive sound design, and smooth animations. Featuring Terralith, Iris + Complementary Shaders, and Sound Physics Remastered, this pack delivers a cinematic and grounded experience—perfect for exploration, building, or just soaking in the view.
